'''Sinsang''' was an industrious [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Gamer7" /> located in the [[Sinsang system/Legends|Sinsang system]], a part of the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was situated on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Veragi Trade Route/Legends|Veragi Trade Route]], which connected it to the [[Anx Minor system/Legends|Anx Minor]], [[Neka system/Legends|Neka]], and [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

Sinsang was among the thousands of worlds of the Raioballo [[Sector/Legends|sector]] represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]]<ref name="Gamer7" /> until his retirement<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|news/13321_3.html|Senator Horox Ryyder Retires}}</ref> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|news/13321_3.html|Senator Horox Ryyder Retires}}, which mentions [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder's]] retirement, is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:3:21," which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Ryyder was level-headed and impartial in representing his constituents and never favored [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the Anx [[Species/Legends|species]], over other worlds of the sector, including Sinsang.<ref name="Gamer7" /> Between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Sinsang was situated in the territory of the [[Pentastar Alignment]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sinsang was first mentioned in "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Anx]]," an article authored by [[Craig Robert Carey|Craig R. Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], and [[Daniel Wallace]] and published in [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]]<ref name="Gamer7" /> on [[October 16]], [[2001]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20011018.html|text=Live on the Fringe: ''Gamer'' # 7}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Sinsang [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Sinsang itself, in grid square L-4.<ref name="TEA" />
